calendar.matters:
Motion For Order To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Cal. Civ. Proc. Code 664.6;
Off Calendar Jul-26-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF NORTHSTAR EDUCATION FINANCE, INC.'s Motion For Order To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Cal. Civ. Proc. Code 664.6.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to enter judgment pursuant to stipulation for entry of judgment pursuant to Cal. Civ. Proc. Code 664.6" is granted.

Counsel for the moving party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
